title: Feature Orbit
description: A high-energy product feature reveal with orbiting UI cards, cursor interactions, tactile button feedback, and particle accents.

source.name: iPolloWork · HyperFrames
source.attribution: Original iPolloWork composition inspired by HyperFrames showcase and motion catalog patterns.

applyChecklist: Replace the feature names and proof point with the complete product brief.
Keep the three feature cards visually distinct and reveal them in spoken order.
Use the accent variable for the orbit, click ripple, and key proof point.
Verify that the cursor interaction and particle burst remain visible at 30 fps.
